root.speaker: Cache Pantry-Keeper
root.text:
Mind your step. The shelves remember being full.
Most of what's here is from yesterday. Some is older.

good.speaker: Cache Pantry-Keeper
good.text:
Stale, but here. That's not nothing. Some days a stale
thing close at hand is better than a fresh thing far away.

keep.speaker: Cache Pantry-Keeper
keep.text:
It costs nothing to keep, mostly. And clearing takes
the kind of attention I don't always have.
`rm -rf ~/.cache` — safe to clear, they say.

props.message:
`rm -rf ~/.cache` — safe to clear.

The kin repeat this like a prayer. Nobody ever does it.

A shelf of jars labelled by date.

The newest is a week old. The oldest predates the
Drawing-In.

Damp stone underfoot. The air smells like an offering
left out too long.

props.open_message: Five pebbles. Worth keeping, for a little while.
